caption: A woman with dark hair and a light complexion is seen in a medium close-up shot, wearing a blue and white striped collared shirt and black over-ear headphones with an attached microphone. She is positioned in an indoor setting with a light-colored wall behind her and pale green curtains to her left. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom-left corner of each frame. Throughout the sequence, she faces forward, looking toward the camera while speaking. Her mouth opens and closes as she talks, and her facial expression remains neutral to focused. There are no other people or significant objects visible in the scene. The background and her attire remain constant across the frames, with the only movement being the subtle shifts in her facial muscles and lip movements as she speaks.
